text: Prevent movements between the owner's accounts from being counted as External Spend. Evidence: assumption — transfers are expected across three owned accounts and are governed by A11; workflows UC-LEDGER-004 and UC-LEDGER-011.
target: Only active explicitly confirmed transfer links contribute zero External Spend; both source facts and attributable active/retired link history remain queryable; void, supersession, revocation, or replacement updates active actuals atomically.
